// 1. Check if the Scaffold plugin is installed
<cfif listFindNoCase(pluginNames(), "scaffold")>
    // do something cool
</cfif>

// 2. Output all installed plugin names
names = pluginNames();
// names -> "scaffold,formobject,myplugin" (comma-separated list of installed plugin names)

// 3. Loop over installed plugins
<cfloop list="#pluginNames()#" index="pluginName">
    writeOutput(pluginName);
</cfloop>
